scripts.build: npm run clean:scripts && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json && node tools/format-compiled-js.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run verify && npm run smoke:lsp && npm run smoke:bridge && npm run smoke:vue-diagnostics && npm run test:diagnostics-scheduler && npm run test:bridge-params && npm run test:initialization-options && npm run test:nuxt-definitions && npm run test:disabled-settings && npm run package
scripts.check:nova: npm run check && nova extension validate build/Vue.novaextension
